title: Agent Registry
description: Registry of all known agents: logical agent_id, provider binding, runtime state, attach handles.

AgentId.description: Stable logical worker ID (kebab-case), e.g. 'agent-01' or 'bob'.

AgentStatus.description: Runtime status. 'offline' means not contactable; may still hold an active claim with a live lease.

Provider.description: Provider driving this agent. 'human' is valid for manually-operated slots.

model.description: Model identifier within the provider (e.g. 'claude-sonnet-4-6', 'o4-mini'). Optional for human slots.

dispatch_mode.description: How tasks are assigned to this agent. Overrides global dispatch_mode if set.

role.description: Primary orchestration role. Workers and reviewers execute tasks; master creates and delegates tasks only.

capabilities.description: Optional capability tags used for routing and delegation.

session_handle.description: Local attach target (adapter-specific handle, e.g. pty:agent-id). Null when offline.

provider_ref.description: Adapter-internal reference (e.g. Codex session UUID, Claude session ID). Opaque to core.

last_heartbeat_at.description: Timestamp of last heartbeat received. Null if agent has never sent one.
